description_long: This is a short wooden picket fence section, constructed from light-colored, unfinished timber. The fence features six vertical pickets with rounded tops, evenly spaced and attached to two horizontal rails. The wood grain is visible, giving it a natural and rustic appearance suitable for gardens, parks, or residential yards. The structure is simple, with no decorative elements or post caps, emphasizing functionality over ornamentation. The fence is relatively low in height, making it more of a boundary marker than a security barrier. Its lightweight build suggests it can be easily moved or repositioned as needed.
description: A small, light-colored wooden picket fence with six rounded-top pickets and two horizontal rails, showing visible wood grain and a simple, rustic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing six evenly spaced, rounded-top pickets attached to two horizontal rails.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the alignment of the pickets and rails.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the same picket and rail arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and construction details.
